raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 1,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (Kıcıman et al., 2023) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works.",
    "R1.7": "No citation-level engagement; no mention of relevant citations or scholarship.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for some claims, but not all; could be more explicit about confidence levels.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed scope (causal effect identification from natural-language study descriptions).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free, but with minor regressions in terms of accuracy and scale compared to human experts.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but could be more explicit about the role of each agent."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (Kıcıman et al., 2023) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: No citation-level engagement; no mention of relevant citations or scholarship.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for some claims, but not all; could be more explicit about confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed scope (causal effect identification from natural-language study descriptions).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free, but with minor regressions in terms of accuracy and scale compared to human experts.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but could be more explicit about the role of each agent.
